##RRUFFID=R220007
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Mg_5_(CO_3_)_4_(OH)_2_·4H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Correc d'en Llinassos, Oms, Céret, Pyrénées-Orientales, Occitanie, France
##OWNER=Joan Rosell-Riba
##SOURCE=Joan Rosell-Riba, Jordi Ibáñez (Geo3Bcn-CSIC), Tariq Jawhari (CCiTUB)
##DESCRIPTION=White spherical aggregates, SEM-EDS analysis indicates only Mg
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R220007
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 10.115 b: 8.957 c: 8.379 alpha: 90 beta: 114.63 gamma: 90 volume: 690 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=532
